headline: Is It Too Late To Consider GE Vernova (GEV) After Its 171% One-Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering if GE Vernova's share price still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock last closed at US$909.41, with returns of 7.7% over 7 days, 9.5% over 30 days, 33.8% year to date, and 171.3% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about what is already reflected in current expectations. Recent coverage has focused on GE Vernova as a pure play in its sector following the separation from its former parent...

headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
